clues: Several Windows computers in the IT department are not applying the latest group policy changes.
Running 'gpupdate /force' completes without errors but policies remain unchanged.
Other computers in a different organizational unit applied the same policies successfully.
The affected computers show event ID 1058 in the System log related to Group Policy processing.
The local Group Policy cache in the 'C:\Windows\System32\GroupPolicy' directory has inconsistent timestamps.
